Development and Alumni Engagement

Our Development and Alumni Engagement Office helps alumni and supporters find exciting opportunities to connect with and give back to Oxford Law. We warmly welcome exploratory conversations around gifting opportunities.  

Contact Us

 

To start a conversation about making a donation or enquire about alumni events, volunteering, or anything else, please email development@law.ox.ac.uk or call (+44) 01865 611542. 

Meet Our Team

Craig Edwards

Head of Development

Stuart Watson

Development and Alumni Engagement Coordinator

Katie Foxton

Development Officer

Useful links for alumni

  • My Oxford Online: Register to receive news, updates, and event invitations by registering and updating your contact details.
  • Oxford University Careers Service: Visit to log in to CareerConnect and access job vacancy boards, careers fairs, webinars, and private career guidance appointments.  
  • Oxford Alumni – Your Certificates: Visit for guidance on how to access electronic degree certificates and transcripts, or order paper copies.
